_snapshot_note: Net-new workflow for the Templates→Onboarding 'Old forms' section. GET /webhook/legacy-onboarding-list. Reads Supabase legacy_onboarding (service role) — the historical Notion intake, migrated as-is — and returns {ok,count,submissions}. Account logins were already stripped at export/import time; the Strip Credentials node is a defense-in-depth safety net. Clone of 'SyncView Onboarding — List' (slqt2zCDyIc7OAmY) pointed at legacy_onboarding, returning `fields` (the original Q&A) instead of `answers`. Import into n8n and ACTIVATE. Requires legacy-onboarding-migration.sql to have been run so the table exists.
name: SyncView Onboarding — Legacy List
